final:
module shift_reg_8bit(
    input clk, 
    input rst, 
    input si, 
    output reg [7:0] po);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst)
            po <= 8'b00000000;
        else
            po <= {po[6:0], si};
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (rst) begin
        po <= 8'b11111111;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
